title: Construction Project Management Software | SiteFlow ERP
metaTitle: Construction Project Management Software | SiteFlow ERP
metaDescription: An all-in-one construction project management software for owners. Track multiple projects easily with SiteFlow ERP
author: SiteFlow Operations Team
body:
Construction Project Management Software

Construction Project Management Software Built for Site Execution

Struggling with delays, scattered updates, and poor site coordination? Manage tasks, progress, and BOQ vs actuals in one system. Used by growing construction teams to reduce delays, improve coordination, and control project execution.

Get Free Demo
Check Pricing

Keep construction projects on track from BOQ to completion

SiteFlow connects BOQ, project planning, and site level progress tracking into one system so every task, milestone, and quantity is visible to both the office and the field. This gives project managers a reliable way to track execution instead of relying on manual reports and calls.

BOQ driven project planning

Most construction projects start with a BOQ, but once work begins it stops guiding execution. In SiteFlow, every BOQ item becomes the base for planning and tracking so quantities, scope, and budgets stay connected to what is actually happening on site.

Task and activity level planning

Projects fail when work is not broken into clear activities with owners and timelines. SiteFlow turns BOQ items into daily tasks and schedules so every activity is planned, assigned, and tracked against the project timeline.

Daily progress and DPR from site

Site updates usually come through calls and WhatsApp, which gives no reliable picture of progress. SiteFlow captures DPR, photos, and measurements directly from the field so managers can see real work completed each day.

Budget versus actual linked to work done

Costs and progress are often tracked separately, which hides overruns until it is too late. SiteFlow compares planned quantities and budgets with actual work completed so deviations become visible while the project is still running.

Head
Core Features

Core Features for SiteFlow Project Management Software India

Digitisation makes the fast-paced and frequently unpredictable world of construction more organised. Here is what SiteFlow gives every project team.

Mobile-first Reporting

Site engineers and supervisors can provide updates at any time of the day. They can record progress, upload images, and report problems right from their phones with SiteFlow. Teams in the office can know the most recent status right away, so decisions are not put off.

Card 2: Material and Inventory Tracking

Material and Inventory Tracking

Every action can be recorded in the system, whether it is cement coming at daybreak or steel being utilised to reinforce something. This helps cut down on waste, stops shortages from happening at the last minute, and gives contractors more control over project prices.

Labor Management

Labour management is a critical component of Project Management Software India. With SiteFlow you can track, manage and pay labour effortlessly — tracking salary and attendance, labour shifts, labour expenses, generating PDF reports, and automated salary calculation.

Cost Monitoring

Budgets do not always go as anticipated, but with SiteFlow you can discover the holes early. The software compares planned budgets with actual spending, helping you prevent cost overruns before they happen.

Daily Progress Reports

With the help of SiteFlow, you can analyse the speed of work, the cost and so on by getting real time updates. You can get Daily Progress Reports (DPR), expense reports, and project related reports within the app through which you can analyse and plan the future processes.

Why you should choose SiteFlow construction
project management software

SiteFlow isn’t just a construction progress tracking software; it’s a business control system for owners and contractors. By replacing scattered processes with a single source of truth, it ensures:

BOQ linked project communication

Most construction teams rely on calls, WhatsApp messages, and scattered updates to understand what is happening on site. This creates confusion because no one can see how work compares to what was originally planned and sold. SiteFlow keeps all project updates connected to BOQ items and tasks so every instruction, clarification, and update is tied to the exact scope of work.

Share task level updates and progress against BOQ items

Keep office and site teams working from the same live project data

Avoid confusion caused by verbal instructions and outdated spreadsheets

Verified daily progress and DPR

Project managers usually find out about delays only after milestones are missed because daily reporting is manual and unreliable. SiteFlow captures site updates, progress, and measurements directly from the field so managers know what work was completed each day without waiting for calls or emails.

Capture daily progress reports directly from site

Attach photos and measurements to verify work completed

Access built-in margin and cost analysis before sending any quote

See delays and slow moving activities as they happen

Task driven project execution

Without clear task ownership and schedules, work drifts and accountability disappears. SiteFlow converts BOQ items into daily tasks with defined timelines and responsibilities so every activity has an owner and a deadline that can be tracked from the office.

Assign tasks to site teams based on BOQ and schedule

Track completion and pending work for each activity

Identify slippages before they turn into project delays

Budget versus progress control

Most projects track costs and work separately, which hides overruns until the project is almost finished. SiteFlow compares planned quantities and budgets with actual work completed so managers can see where material, labour, or time is being consumed faster than planned.

Compare planned quantities with site level progress

Track budget consumption against work completed

Spot overruns early and take corrective action

Section Head
Construction Project Management Software

How SiteFlow Builds Accountability
Across Every Project

Digitisation makes the fast-paced world of construction more organised. Here is how SiteFlow gives every project a clear owner, a live record, and no room for guesswork.

Top row: 3 cards
1

Defining Roles and Responsibilities

Assign tasks to subcontractors and site workers with clear ownership so every activity has a name behind it. When responsibility is defined, progress tracking becomes automatic and disputes stop before they start.

2

Maintaining Accurate Site Records

Site teams update progress with photos and documents directly in the app. Every inspection detail and progress entry is timestamped and stored — no more relying on WhatsApp forwards or paper registers for critical data.

3

Tracking Materials and Machinery

Know exactly how much of each material has been used and how much remains across every site. Unrecorded usage and misplaced equipment stop draining budgets when every item has a digital trail from delivery to consumption.

Bottom row: 2 cards centred
4

Strengthening Communication

Messages scattered across WhatsApp groups and email threads create confusion. SiteFlow keeps all communication tied to specific tasks and projects in one place — so every team member knows exactly where to look, cutting hours of back-and-forth daily.

5

Transparent Progress Monitoring

Get Daily Progress Reports, expense reports, and project summaries directly in the app. Analyse the speed of work and costs in real time so you can plan ahead — instead of finding out about overruns after the fact.

Section Head
Site Productivity

How Construction Project Tracking Software
Enhances Site Productivity

Strip 1
01
Real-Time Monitoring

Real-Time Project Monitoring

Contractors can monitor project progress in real-time with SiteFlow Construction Management Software. This includes tracking task completion, resource allocation, and overall project advancement. This real-time visibility allows for prompt decision-making and intervention when necessary.

Strip 2
02
Resource Optimization

Resource Optimization

SiteFlow CMS assists in optimizing resource allocation by providing insights into workforce availability, equipment utilization, and material requirements. This enables construction business owners to allocate resources efficiently, preventing bottlenecks and maximizing productivity on the construction site.

Strip 3
03
Task Automation

Task Automation

Automation is a key feature of SiteFlow CMS that simplifies repetitive tasks, reducing manual workload and the likelihood of errors. From document management to progress tracking, automation ensures that routine processes are executed seamlessly, freeing up valuable time for more strategic activities.

Divider Band
Expenses, Labor & Material Tracking
Strip 4
04
Expense Tracking

Expense Tracking

SiteFlow Construction Management Software includes features for accurate expense tracking. It allows for the recording and monitoring of all project-related expenses, from material purchases to labor costs. This transparency is crucial for staying within budget and making informed financial decisions.

Strip 5
05
Labor Management

Labor Management

Efficient labor management is vital for project success. SiteFlow CMS facilitates the tracking of work hours, labor costs, and productivity levels. It also aids in workforce planning by providing insights into labor availability, helping construction business owners make informed decisions about staffing.

Strip 6
06
Material Tracking

Material Tracking

Tracking and managing construction materials is made seamless with SiteFlow CMS. From procurement to usage, the software provides a detailed overview of material inventories, preventing shortages or wastage. This ensures that the right materials are available when needed, contributing to project efficiency.

Customer Success Story
“

We were running three residential projects at the same time and had no real visibility into any of them. Labour attendance was on paper, material requests came over phone calls, and by the time we knew something had gone wrong, it had already cost us. Switching to SiteFlow changed how we operate entirely. We now know every morning exactly how many workers are on site, what materials have been consumed, and where the budget stands — across all three projects at once. We recovered nearly ₹6 lakhs in the first quarter just by catching material discrepancies the system flagged.

★ ★ ★ ★ ★
✕ Before SiteFlow
Paper attendance registers with no verification · Material requests over phone with no PO tracking · Budget status unknown until month-end · Three projects, zero consolidated visibility
→
✓ After SiteFlow
GPS-verified attendance across all sites · Every delivery matched to purchase order · Live budget and P&L updated daily · ₹6L recovered in Q1 from material discrepancies caught early
Mr. Vikram Choudhary, Managing Director Choudhary Buildcon Pvt. Ltd. · Residential & Commercial Construction · Pune, Maharashtra

FAQ

What is construction project management software?

Construction project management software helps contractors and developers plan, track, and control every stage of construction projects. SiteFlow’s platform offers BOQ-linked planning, DPR automation, subcontractor billing, and real-time progress tracking, making it a complete solution for owners and site teams.

How does SiteFlow construction project management software help in construction progress tracking?

SiteFlow acts as a construction progress tracking software by capturing Daily Progress Reports (DPRs) with photos, videos, and quantity updates. It provides real-time dashboards so project managers and owners can monitor site activities from anywhere.

Why do construction companies need digital project management software?

Manual tracking through spreadsheets and WhatsApp leads to delays, miscommunication, and cost overruns. A digital project management platform like SiteFlow construction project management software ensures real-time updates, budget control, and better coordination between site and office teams.

Does SiteFlow construction project management software support BOQ-based project planning?

Yes. SiteFlow construction project management software links every material request and task schedule to the Bill of Quantities (BOQ), helping businesses maintain budget vs actual cost control throughout the project.

Can SiteFlow construction project management software manage multiple projects at once?

Absolutely. SiteFlow construction project management software provides a multi-project dashboard, giving owners and managers a consolidated view of progress, resource allocation, and financial health across all sites.

How does SiteFlow construction project management software integrate with financial systems?

SiteFlow construction project management software integrates seamlessly with Tally and Zoho Books, syncing vendor bills, subcontractor invoices, and project P&L reports. This reduces manual errors and improves financial visibility.

Is SiteFlow suitable for construction project owners?

Yes. SiteFlow ERP is designed as a construction project management software for owners, giving them control over timelines, costs, and resource usage through real-time dashboards and reports.

How does SiteFlow ensure data security?

SiteFlow uses AWS cloud hosting with encryption, daily backups, and role-based access controls, ensuring that sensitive project data remains secure and accessible only to authorized users.

How quickly can SiteFlow software be implemented?

Unlike traditional ERPs that take months, SiteFlow can be implemented within 1–2 weeks. The system is designed for easy adoption with mobile + ERP connectivity, making it an easy construction project management software for any team.
